title: GateResult
description: Result of a single verification gate check. Produced by a verification gate runner, consumed by a reviewer agent and release pipeline.

run_id.description: Reference to the RunSpec being gated.

gate_level.description: Priority level of this gate check.

result.description: Outcome of the gate check. P0 gates with 'fail' or 'blocked' must block delivery.

checked_at.description: ISO8601 timestamp when the check was performed.

signer_role.description: Role of the person or agent that performed this gate check. Must not be executor, fixer, or coder.

evidence_ids.description: Evidence identifiers referenced by this gate.

recommendation.description: Suggested action if the result is not 'pass'.
